      • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

        Rayo will want to control the ball and dictate the tempo at home, but Getafe’s grit and direct transitions could make it a scrappy, high‑intensity battle. Midfield duels and who wins the second balls will shape the game — if Rayo break lines quickly they’ll create the clearer chances, but Getafe are capable of making it tight and uncomfortable throughout.
